code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test12-JAN-2025Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals proteinuria, glucosuria, ketonuria, and bilirubinuria, with low specific gravity and abnormal urine appearance, indicating possible renal tubular dysfunction and/or systemic metabolic disturbance. HbA1c is low, which may reflect recent hypoglycemia or anemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further evaluation for renal and metabolic disorders.

coding.display: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
